commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Day. It was distant from Aphec about 90 miles.
Smitten, yet without killing any. (Calmet)
We may adore a merciful Providence, which prevented these barbarians from treating David's men as he had treated theirs, chap. xxvii. 11. (Salien, the year before Christ 1074.)
He would allow them to burn the city, that David might be roused to execute the divine vengeance upon them. (Theodoret)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
